headline: SPXC Climbs 26% in a Year: Is the Stock Poised for More Growth?
summary: SPX Technologies' 26.1% one-year gain, rising data center demand, capacity expansion and raised guidance point to continued growth potential.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Carrier Global, Raises Price Target to $80
summary: Citigroup  analyst Andrew Kaplowitz   maintains Carrier Global (NYSE:CARR) with a Buy and raises the price target from $79 to $80.
